case_title: PORSCHE LEASING LTD. ET AL VS. STEPHANIE VO ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF REQUESTING COPY BE USED AS ORIGINAL PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.1806 (TRANSACTION ID # 60436454) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORSCHE LEASING LTD. PORSCHE FINANCIAL SERVICE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORSCHE LEASING LTD. PORSCHE FINANCIAL SERVICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VO, STEPHANIE AN INDIVIDUAL $164,109.05 PRINCIPAL, $1,750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $12,724.07 INTEREST, $679.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $179,262.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FURTHER, A JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF PERSONAL PROPERTY IDENTIFIED AS A 2015 PORSCHE 911 TURBO, VEHICLE IDENTIFICATION NUMBER WP0CD2A93FS178296 AS AGAINST DEFENDANT STEPHANIE VO, AN INDIVIDUAL. UPON POSSESSION AND DISPOSAL OF THE VEHICLE, ANY AMOUNT RECEIVED FROM AUCTION OR SALE OF THE VEHICLE, MINUS THE COSTS AND EXPENSES OF SUCH AUCTION OR SALE, SHALL BE CREDITED TO AND USED TO DECREASE THE AMOUNT OF THE MONEY JUDGMENT SET FORTH HEREIN.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment For Unlimited Civil Action
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Stacey A. Miller, Esq., appearing via CourtCall for Plaintiff Porsche Leasing Ltd.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Stephanie Vo.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $164,109.05
Pre-Judgment Interest: $12,724.07
Attorney's Fees: $1,750.00
Costs: $679.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $179,262.62
As to the money judgment against Stephanie Vo, an individual, upon possession and disposal of the vehicle, any amount received from auction or sale of the vehicle, minus the costs and expenses of such auction or sale, shall be credited to and used to decrease the amount of the money judgment set forth herein.
Further, a Judgment for Possession of Personal Property identified as a 2015 Porsche 911 Turbo, Vehicle Identification Number WP0CD2A93FS178296 as against defendant Stephanie Vo, an individual.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To Jul-12-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
